channel.title: +Data on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Data on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Blood
item.description: Indian list @Mindmusclepro suggests Fasting glucose Fasting Insulin Helps diagnose insulin resistance Post-prandial (PP) glucose HBa1C / a1c (average blood sugar levels over the past 3 months. [pre]diabetes risk assessment.) Lipid Profile (cholesterol + triglycerides - atherosclerosis risk) Vitamin D Often low in case of inadequate sun exposure. Vitamin B12 Often low in vegetarians. Homocysteine (Stroke risk measurement, B12 correlation) Hs-CRP (atherosclerosis risk) Liver function test (LFT) Kidney function test (KFT)
